PROJECT DETAILS

Collective Bikes

Lifestyle
CLIENT / Collective Bikes
LOCATION / London
YEAR / 2026
IMAGES / 23
SOCIAL MEDIA CAMPAIGN FOR COLLECTIVE BIKES, SHOT ON 35MM FILM ACROSS THE STREETS OF ELEPHANT AND CASTLE, SOUTH LONDON. THE PROJECT BLENDS URBAN CULTURE WITH THE IDENTITY OF THE BRAND, CAPTURING ANALOG GRAIN, RAW LOCATIONS, AUTHENTIC TALENT, AND A VISUAL LANGUAGE THAT FEELS AS LIVED-IN AS THE NEIGHBOURHOOD ITSELF.
